title: versioning — Eloquent observers
description: Two observers on the two entities. Enforce state machine transitions + registry cache invalidation + deletion refusal on system rows.

handles: updated (state=deprecated) → fire ApiVersionDeprecated + emit affected_subscription_count via webhook module query
updated (state=sunset) → fire ApiVersionSunset + trigger AutoUpgradePinnedSubscriptions listener on webhook
updated (is_default) → unset is_default on the previous default row (single-default invariant)
updating (migration_target_slug set) → refuse when migration_target references self OR references a version in state=sunset
deleting → refuse when is_system=true unless super_admin
deleting → refuse when state ≠ draft (only draft versions can be deleted; released+ are archived via sunset workflow)
deleting → refuse when any WebhookSubscription references this slug
updated (state=published) → fire DeprecationNoticePublished + dispatch PublishDeprecationNoticeJob when notify_customers=true

updating (published notice) → refuse text edits unless super_admin — published notices are append-only; text corrections require new draft → publish workflow. Text edits captured via HasVersions do not fire an update event (versionable is transparent)
deleting → refuse when is_system=true unless super_admin
deleting → refuse when state=published unless super_admin (archive first)
